name: bouncer-ui
description: Bouncer PDP UI - Policy Decision Point Management

authModes.note: JSON has no comments; this block documents how to switch the UI between mocked-subject and real OIDC. The repo ships .env.demo and .env.oidc templates with sensible defaults; .env is a symlink to whichever one you want active. The UI also reads /auth/config from the API at startup, so VITE_AUTH_MODE is just the first-render hint.
authModes.switch:
ln -sf .env.demo .env   # mock mode
ln -sf .env.oidc .env   # OIDC mode (Keycloak by default)

mock.behavior: Login button shows a dropdown of seeded demo subjects. Axios sends X-Actor-Uid on every API call.

oidc.behavior: Login button redirects to VITE_OIDC_ISSUER (Auth Code + PKCE). After /callback the UI calls /auth/me and stores the resolved local Subject. Axios sends Authorization: Bearer <access_token> on every API call.
